# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent linkerd no mtls.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd
  labels:
    linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "true"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd-identity
  namespace: linkerd
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd-proxy-injector
  namespace: linkerd
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd-tap
  namespace: linkerd
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd-destination
  namespace: linkerd
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd-proxy
  namespace: linkerd
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd-oc
  namespace: linkerd
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd-jaeger
  namespace: linkerd
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd-prometheus
  namespace: linkerd
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd-grafana
  namespace: linkerd
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd-web
  namespace: linkerd
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd-destination
  namespace: linkerd
---

kind: ServiceAccount

  name: linkerd-identity
  namespace: linkerd

  name: linkerd-prometheus
  namespace: linkerd

kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd-grafana
  namespace: linkerd
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd-web
  namespace: linkerd
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: linkerd-identity
rules:
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["secrets"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: linkerd-proxy-injector
rules:
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["pods"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "patch"]
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["services"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["configmaps"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: linkerd-tap
rules:
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["pods"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["services"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: linkerd-destination
rules:
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["pods"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["services"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: linkerd-proxy
rules:
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["pods"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: linkerd-oc
rules:
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["pods"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
---

  name: linkerd-jaeger

  resources: ["pods"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]

  name: linkerd-prometheus

  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]

  name: linkerd-grafana
rules:

  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: linkerd-web
rules:
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["pods"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: linkerd-identity
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: linkerd-identity
  namespace: linkerd
roleRef:
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: linkerd-identity
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: linkerd-proxy-injector
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: linkerd-proxy-injector
  namespace: linkerd
roleRef:
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: linkerd-proxy-injector
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: linkerd-tap
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: linkerd-tap
  namespace: linkerd
roleRef:
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: linkerd-tap
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: linkerd-destination
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: linkerd-destination
  namespace: linkerd
roleRef:
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: linkerd-destination
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: linkerd-proxy
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: linkerd-proxy
  namespace: linkerd
roleRef:
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: linkerd-proxy
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: linkerd-oc
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: linkerd-oc
  namespace: linkerd
roleRef:
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: linkerd-oc
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: linkerd-jaeger
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: linkerd-jaeger
  namespace: linkerd
roleRef:
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: linkerd-jaeger
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: linkerd-prometheus
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: linkerd-prometheus
  namespace: linkerd
roleRef:
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: linkerd-prometheus
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: linkerd-grafana
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: linkerd-grafana
  namespace: linkerd
roleRef:
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: linkerd-grafana
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: linkerd-web
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: linkerd-web
  namespace: linkerd
roleRef:
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: linkerd-web
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: linkerd-identity
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: linkerd-identity
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: linkerd-identity
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: linkerd-identity
      containers:
      - name: identity
        image: cr.l5d.io/linkerd/linkerd-identity:stable-2.12.2
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
        - containerPort: 8443
        args:
        - identity
        - --trust-domain=cluster.local
        - --identity-issuer-certificate-file=/var/linkerd/identity/issuer.crt
        - --identity-issuer-key-file=/var/linkerd/identity/issuer.key
        volumeMounts:
        - name: identity-issuer
          mountPath: /var/linkerd/identity
          readOnly: true
      volumes:
      - name: identity-issuer
        secret:
          secretName: linkerd-identity-issuer
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: linkerd-proxy-injector
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: linkerd-proxy-injector
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: linkerd-proxy-injector
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: linkerd-proxy-injector
      containers:
      - name: proxy-injector
        image: cr.l5d.io/linkerd/linkerd-proxy-injector:stable-2.12.2
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8443
        args:
        - proxy-injector
        - --namespace=linkerd
        - --webhook-port=8443
        - --webhook-cert-file=/var/linkerd/proxy-injector/tls.crt
        - --webhook-key-file=/var/linkerd/proxy-injector/tls.key
        volumeMounts:
        - name: proxy-injector-tls
          mountPath: /var/linkerd/proxy-injector
          readOnly: true
      volumes:
      - name: proxy-injector-tls
        secret:
          secretName: linkerd-proxy-injector-tls
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: linkerd-tap
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: linkerd-tap
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: linkerd-tap
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: linkerd-tap
      containers:
      - name: tap
        image: cr.l5d.io/linkerd/linkerd-tap:stable-2.12.2
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
        - containerPort: 8443
        args:
        - tap
        - --namespace=linkerd
        - --tap-cert-file=/var/linkerd/tap/tls.crt
        - --tap-key-file=/var/linkerd/tap/tls.key
        volumeMounts:
        - name: tap-tls
          mountPath: /var/linkerd/tap
          readOnly: true
      volumes:
      - name: tap-tls
        secret:
          secretName: linkerd-tap-tls
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: linkerd-destination
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: linkerd-destination
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: linkerd-destination
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: linkerd-destination
      containers:
      - name: destination
        image: cr.l5d.io/linkerd/linkerd-destination:stable-2.12.2
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8086
        - containerPort: 8443
        args:
        - destination
        - --namespace=linkerd
        - --destination-cert-file=/var/linkerd/destination/tls.crt
        - --destination-key-file=/var/linkerd/destination/tls.key
        volumeMounts:
        - name: destination-tls
          mountPath: /var/linkerd/destination
          readOnly: true
      volumes:
      - name: destination-tls
        secret:
          secretName: linkerd-destination-tls
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-identity
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  selector:
    app: linkerd-identity
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
  - port: 8443
    targetPort: 8443
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-proxy-injector
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  selector:
    app: linkerd-proxy-injector
  ports:
  - port: 8443
    targetPort: 8443
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-tap
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  selector:
    app: linkerd-tap
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
  - port: 8443
    targetPort: 8443
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-destination
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  selector:
    app: linkerd-destination
  ports:
  - port: 8086
    targetPort: 8086
  - port: 8443
    targetPort: 8443
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-config
  namespace: linkerd
data:
  config.yaml: |
    admin:
      port: 9999
    identity:
      trustDomain: cluster.local
    proxy:
      inbound:
        port: 4143
      outbound:
        port: 4140
    tap:
      port: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: linkerd-identity-issuer
  namespace: linkerd
type: Opaque
data:
  issuer.crt: <base64_encoded_cert>
  issuer.key: <base64_encoded_key>
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: linkerd-proxy-injector-tls
  namespace: linkerd
type: Opaque
data:
  tls.crt: <base64_encoded_cert>
  tls.key: <base64_encoded_key>
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: linkerd-tap-tls
  namespace: linkerd
type: Opaque
data:
  tls.crt: <base64_encoded_cert>
  tls.key: <base64_encoded_key>
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: linkerd-destination-tls
  namespace: linkerd
type: Opaque
data:
  tls.crt: <base64_encoded_cert>
  tls.key: <base64_encoded_key>
---
apiVersion: admissionregistration.k8s.io/v1
kind: MutatingWebhookConfiguration
metadata:
  name: linkerd-proxy-injector-webhook-config
webhooks:
- name: linkerd-proxy-injector.linkerd.io
  clientConfig:
    service:
      name: linkerd-proxy-injector
      namespace: linkerd
      path: "/proxy-injector"
    caBundle: <base64_encoded_ca>
  rules:
  - apiGroups: [""]
    apiVersions: ["v1"]
    operations: ["CREATE"]
    resources: ["pods"]
  failurePolicy: Fail
  sideEffects: None
---
apiVersion: policy/v1beta1
kind: PodSecurityPolicy
metadata:
  name: linkerd-identity
spec:
  privileged: false
  allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
  requiredDropCapabilities:
  - ALL
  volumes:
  - 'secret'
  - 'emptyDir'
  hostNetwork: false
  hostIPC: false
  hostPID: false
  runAsUser:
    rule: 'RunAsAny'
  seLinux:
    rule: 'RunAsAny'
  supplementalGroups:
    rule: 'RunAsAny'
  fsGroup:
    rule: 'RunAsAny'
---
apiVersion: policy/v1beta1
kind: PodSecurityPolicy
metadata:
  name: linkerd-proxy-injector
spec:
  privileged: false
  allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
  requiredDropCapabilities:
  - ALL
  volumes:
  - 'secret'
  - 'emptyDir'
  hostNetwork: false
  hostIPC: false
  hostPID: false
  runAsUser:
    rule: 'RunAsAny'
  seLinux:
    rule: 'RunAsAny'
  supplementalGroups:
    rule: 'RunAsAny'
  fsGroup:
    rule: 'RunAsAny'
---
apiVersion: policy/v1beta1
kind: PodSecurityPolicy
metadata:
  name: linkerd-tap
spec:
  privileged: false
  allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
  requiredDropCapabilities:
  - ALL
  volumes:
  - 'secret'
  - 'emptyDir'
  hostNetwork: false
  hostIPC: false
  hostPID: false
  runAsUser:
    rule: 'RunAsAny'
  seLinux:
    rule: 'RunAsAny'
  supplementalGroups:
    rule: 'RunAsAny'
  fsGroup:
    rule: 'RunAsAny'
---
apiVersion: policy/v1beta1
kind: PodSecurityPolicy
metadata:
  name: linkerd-destination
spec:
  privileged: false
  allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
  requiredDropCapabilities:
  - ALL
  volumes:
  - 'secret'
  - 'emptyDir'
  hostNetwork: false
  hostIPC: false
  hostPID: false
  runAsUser:
    rule: 'RunAsAny'
  seLinux:
    rule: 'RunAsAny'
  supplementalGroups:
    rule: 'RunAsAny'
  fsGroup:
    rule: 'RunAsAny'
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: production
  labels:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: staging
  labels:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: development
  labels:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-service
  namespace: production
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: api-service
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: auth-service
  namespace: production
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: auth-service
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database-service
  namespace: production
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: database-service
  ports:
  - port: 5432
    targetPort: 5432
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: cache-service
  namespace: production
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: cache-service
  ports:
  - port: 6379
    targetPort: 6379
---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend-service
  namespace: development
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: backend-service
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: analytics-service
  namespace: development
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: analytics-service
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: development
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: notification-service
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: logging-service
  namespace: development
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: logging-service
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: monitoring-service
  namespace: development
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: monitoring-service
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: security-service
  namespace: development
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: security-service
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  port: 8080
  tls:
    mode: mTLS
  authorization:
    policy:
      name: api-policy
      namespace: production
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: auth-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  port: 8080
  tls:
    mode: mTLS
  authorization:
    policy:
      name: auth-policy
      namespace: production
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  port: 5432
  tls:
    mode: mTLS
  authorization:
    policy:
      name: database-policy
      namespace: production
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: cache-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  port: 6379
  tls:
    mode: mTLS
  authorization:
    policy:
      name: cache-policy
      namespace: production
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: messaging-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  port: 5672
  tls:
    mode: mTLS
  authorization:
    policy:
      name: messaging-policy
      namespace: production
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  port: 8080
  tls:
    mode: mTLS
  authorization:
    policy:
      name: frontend-policy
      namespace: production
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  port: 8080
  tls:
    mode: mTLS
  authorization:
    policy:
      name: backend-policy
      namespace: production
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: analytics-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  port: 8080
  tls:
    mode: mTLS
  authorization:
    policy:
      name: analytics-policy
      namespace: production
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: notification-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  port: 8080
  tls:
    mode: mTLS
  authorization:
    policy:
      name: notification-policy
      namespace: production
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: logging-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  port: 8080
  tls:
    mode: mTLS
  authorization:
    policy:
      name: logging-policy
      namespace: production
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: monitoring-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  port: 8080
  tls:
    mode: mTLS
  authorization:
    policy:
      name: monitoring-policy
      namespace: production
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: security-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  port: 8080
  tls:
    mode: mTLS
  authorization:
    policy:
      name: security-policy
      namespace: production
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: api-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  rules:
  - from:
    - principals:
      - name: auth-service.production.svc.cluster.local
      - name: frontend-service.production.svc.cluster.local
    - ports:
      - port: 8080
        protocol: HTTP
  - from:
    - principals:
      - name: backend-service.production.svc.cluster.local
    - ports:
      - port: 8080
        protocol: HTTP
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: auth-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  rules:
  - from:
    - principals:
      - name: api-service.production.svc.cluster.local
    - ports:
      - port: 8080
        protocol: HTTP
  - from:
    - principals:
      - name: frontend-service.production.svc.cluster.local
    - ports:
      - port: 8080
        protocol: HTTP
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: database-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  rules:
  - from:
    - principals:
      - name: backend-service.production.svc.cluster.local
    - ports:
      - port: 5432
        protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: cache-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  rules:
  - from:
    - principals:
      - name: backend-service.production.svc.cluster.local
    - ports:
      - port: 6379
        protocol: TCP
  - from:
    - principals:
      - name: frontend-service.production.svc.cluster.local
    - ports:
      - port: 6379
        protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: messaging-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  rules:
  - from:
    - principals:
      - name: backend-service.production.svc.cluster.local
    - ports:
      - port: 5672
        protocol: TCP
  - from:
    - principals:
      - name: notification-service.production.svc.cluster.local
    - ports:
      - port: 5672
        protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: frontend-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  rules:
  - from:
    - principals:
      - name: api-service.production.svc.cluster.local
    - ports:
      - port: 8080
        protocol: HTTP
  - from:
    - principals:
      - name: auth-service.production.svc.cluster.local
    - ports:
      - port: 8080
        protocol: HTTP
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  rules:
  - from:
    - principals:
      - name: api-service.production.svc.cluster.local
    - ports:
      - port: 8080
        protocol: HTTP
  - from:
    - principals:
      - name: frontend-service.production.svc.cluster.local
    - ports:
      - port: 8080
        protocol: HTTP
  - from:
    - principals:
      - name: analytics-service.production.svc.cluster.local
    - ports:
      - port: 8080
        protocol: HTTP
  - from:
    - principals:
      - name: notification-service.production.svc.cluster.local
    - ports:
      - port: 8080
        protocol: HTTP
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind
